checked.note: manually verified in a running system - the ${$source>/text} event arg delivers the clicked link's text as expected, everything works like the original.

deviations.what: the SEP_CHANGE round-trip (which read a private UI5-internal event path) was removed 2026-07-16 - selectedKey and separatorStyle share one two-way bound path, so the separator switches client-side. Confirm the instant separator change in a running system.
